description: You are preparing an audiobook submission. Using the master recording at /home/ga/Music/raw_narration.wav and the timecode sheet at /home/ga/Documents/chapter_markers.txt, generate four Mono MP3 files (64 kbps, 44.1kHz) named chapter_01.mp3, chapter_02.mp3, chapter_03.mp3, and chapter_04.mp3 in /home/ga/Music/audiobook_delivery/. Each file must be split according to the timecode sheet and include the specified ID3 tags (Artist, Album, Title, Track).
